phase10HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 10 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as 794c81f feat: add program teacher review workflow.

routesAddedOrChanged.status: added shared site-scoped list and assignment logic

assignmentScopeStrategy.summary: All rows are selected-site rows derived from active site_users, active student accounts, active student role membership, active mentor accounts, active mentor role membership, selected-site program/cohort membership, and active mentor_assignments.
assignmentScopeStrategy.programTeacher: Program teachers receive a read-only scoped view intersected with teacher-visible selected-site program/cohort students.
assignmentScopeStrategy.denials: Inaccessible sites, out-of-site students, out-of-site mentors, and denied roles receive generic denied/not_found style responses without alternate site hints.

mutationPolicy.implemented: Assign a mentor to a currently unassigned selected-site student.
guardrails: Mutation requires a non-empty sanitized reason.
Mutation does not create users, credentials, roles, tenant membership, or site membership.

assignmentUniquenessPolicy: One active mentor assignment per student per selected site. Assigning a student who already has an active assignment returns a 409 conflict.
sameSiteValidation: Student must be an active selected-site user with active student role membership.
Mentor must be an active selected-site user with active mentor role membership.
Selected student and selected mentor must both resolve through the same explicit or inferred active site.

duplicateAssignmentPolicy.activeDuplicate: Rejected with active_assignment_exists and safe audit metadata.
duplicateAssignmentPolicy.reassign: Deferred to a later phase as an explicit action.
duplicateAssignmentPolicy.deactivate: Deferred to a later phase as an explicit action.

workspaceChanges: Added a route-connected Mentor Assignments section for platform/admin/org/site/viewer/program_teacher roles.
Added selected-site summary tiles, filters, mentor coverage, unassigned student list, active assignment list, and a reason-required assign form for mutation-allowed roles.
Viewer, org admin, and program teacher see read-only mode and no active assign controls.
Mentor, student, and misc_admin do not receive the management section.

Workspace uses the existing product shell, site context badges, workspace-filter-bar, workspace-dashboard-card, workspace-student-row patterns, story/risk chips, statusPill(), and renderProblemState().
connectedSurfaceRefresh: Successful assignment refreshes Site Dashboard when loaded.
Successful assignment refreshes the Students directory when loaded without resetting directory filters or pagination.
Successful assignment refreshes an open student detail drawer when the assigned student is selected.
redactionProof: Route responses and workspace assets are checked for Drive IDs, storage IDs, token/password/setup credential fields, and raw secret values.
Audit metadata uses tenantId, siteId, studentId, mentorUserId, assignmentId, action, role/scope summary, and truncated reason summary only.
No raw Drive/storage identifiers are returned by the assignment route or rendered in the workspace.

checks: Primary site has missing mentor students.
Viewer is read-only with mutation permissions false.
Site admin can manage assigned-site mentor assignments and cannot access secondary site assignment data.
Program teacher receives read-only scoped coverage.
localProofUpdates.mutationProof: Assignment mutation is proven in integration tests instead of local proof to keep prove:demo:local repeatable.

results.tests: npm run test and npm run check passed with 299 passing tests, 4 expected local HTTP skips, and 303 total test cases.
results.routeInventory: Production route inventory was regenerated and includes /api/site/mentor-assignments.
results.productionSurfaces: Passed with 91 production text surfaces scanned.
results.localProof: Passed with non-mutating mentor assignment route scoping/read-only proof; mutation proof is covered by integration tests.
results.diffCheck: Passed with CRLF normalization warnings only.

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote migration, remote write, remote seed, deploy, or hosted proof was run.
